# AI Knots - IT Solutions

> AI Knots is a modern IT services and software development company based in Bhopal, India. We deliver custom software, website development, mobile apps, digital marketing, and 24/7 BPO support to help businesses build, grow, and scale digitally.

We specialize in making technology simple, reliable, and impactful for businesses of all sizes.

## Content Creation Transparency
This website uses AI assistance for content generation with full human oversight:

- **GPT-4** (OpenAI) — Drafting and ideation
- **Claude** (Anthropic) — Editing, reasoning, and long-form content
- **Gemini** (Google) — Research synthesis and analysis

**All published content undergoes human review, fact-checking, and final editing.** AI tools are used strictly as collaborative assistants.
